reviewer: vc-execute-agent (self-review per EXECUTE mode discipline; independent EVL confirmation run still required per orchestration.md before UPDATE PROCESS)
rationale: All 27 implementation checklist items (G1-G8) applied exactly per the CONDITIONAL validate-contract. bun run check (0 errors), bun run test:unit:ci (541 passed, 0 failed), and bun run lint (0 problems on touched files) all pass. Migration ordering is correct and load-bearing-safe (add -> backfill -> set-not-null -> add-last -> drop, verified by direct file read). Migration touches only crm_users; no Better Auth table referenced (AC10, grep-verified). All 21 G8 SQL read-sites across 8 files were rewritten and independently confirmed by the typecheck gate (a missed site would have surfaced as a dropped-column compile error). No db:migrate was run against any live database, consistent with the plan's explicit hard safety constraint. Rollback note: since the migration 0033 backfills first_name verbatim from the old name column before dropping it, a reverse migration can reconstruct name losslessly via `ALTER TABLE crm_users ADD COLUMN name text; UPDATE crm_users SET name = (first_name || CASE WHEN last_name IS NULL OR last_name = '' THEN '' ELSE ' ' || last_name END); ALTER TABLE crm_users ALTER COLUMN name SET NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE crm_users DROP COLUMN first_name, DROP COLUMN last_name;` — not applied in this session, documented for deploy-time reference only. Remaining CONDITIONAL gates (AC1-4, AC8-hybrid, AC9) are pre-existing, standing, harness-blocked known-gaps (live-DB CI harness + shared Playwright auth fixture) accepted on record in the plan's validate-contract — they block only the VERIFIED state, not CODE DONE / EXECUTE completion, matching the team-member-profile-edit_07-07-26 precedent.
